name: snapstream
title: SnapStream
description: Live TV in Picture-in-Picture — breaking news and sports floating over your workspace
author: amelkamu

preferences.name: playlistUrl
preferences.title: Remote M3U Playlist URL
preferences.description: URL to a remote M3U playlist for additional channels (leave empty to disable)

preferences.name: autoPip
preferences.label: Auto Picture-in-Picture
preferences.description: Automatically enter Picture-in-Picture mode after opening a stream

preferences.name: pipDelay
preferences.title: PiP Delay (seconds)
preferences.description: Seconds to wait before triggering PiP (increase if streams take longer to load)

commands.name: search-channels
commands.title: Search Channels
commands.subtitle: SnapStream
commands.description: Browse and search live TV channels, open in Picture-in-Picture

commands.name: import-channels
commands.title: Import Channels
commands.subtitle: SnapStream
commands.description: Import channels from an M3U playlist file into your channel list
